zh.lifeSummary: 當Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera於1282年出生在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞時，他的父親Pedro Lopez Padilla Ponce De Leon Ballestero To King Pedro I22歲，母親Maria Gonzalez de Leiva21歲。他於1330年與María González de Henestrosa在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安索里亞貝朗加 德 度洛莫拉萊斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1355年在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera于1282年出生在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞时，他的父亲Pedro Lopez Padilla Ponce De Leon Ballestero To King Pedro I22岁，母亲Maria Gonzalez de Leiva21岁。他于1330年与María González de Henestrosa在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安索里亞貝朗加 德 度洛莫拉萊斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1355年在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Padilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Luis, Carlos, Jesus, Ramon, Pedro, Miguel, Ruben, Francisco, Jorge.

Spanish: habitational name from any of various minor places, for example in the provinces of Burgos, Guadalajara, and Valladolid, named from Spanish padilla ‘frying pan, breadpan’ (from Latin patella, a diminutive of patina ‘shallow dish’), a word that was commonly used in the topographic sense of a shallow, gentle depression. In the US, this surname is also found among Native Americans (mainly Pueblos).

variants.name: Padillo
meanings: Spanish: altered form of Padilla , with the male suffix -o for matching with the sex of the bearer of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Juan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , now also used as a given name in English-speaking countries, in spite of the unfavourable associations with Don Juan, the heartless seducer of  Mozart's  opera Don Giovanni (  1788 ) and libertine hero of  Byron's  satirical epic (  1819–24 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: García
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera was born in 1282, in Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain, his father, Pedro Lopez Padilla Ponce De Leon Ballestero To King Pedro I, was 22 and his mother, Maria Gonzalez de Leiva, was 21. He married María González de Henestrosa in 1330, in Morales, Berlanga de Duero, Soria, Castilla y León, Spain. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1355, in Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera est né en 1282, à Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne, son père, Pedro Lopez Padilla Ponce De Leon Ballestero To King Pedro I, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Maria Gonzalez de Leiva, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé María González de Henestrosa en 1330, à Morales, Berlanga de Duero, Soria, Castilla y León, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1355, à Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera 1282 in Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pedro Lopez Padilla Ponce De Leon Ballestero To King Pedro I 22 und seine Mutter Maria Gonzalez de Leiva 21. Er hat 1330 in Morales, Berlanga de Duero, Soria, Castilla y León, Spanien María González de Henestrosa geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1355 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera è nato il nel 1282 nel Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Spagna, il suo padre, Pedro Lopez Padilla Ponce De Leon Ballestero To King Pedro I, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Maria Gonzalez de Leiva, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato María González de Henestrosa nel 1330, nel Morales, Berlanga de Duero, Soria, Castilla y León, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1355, nel Sevilla, Andalucía, Spagna, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villageraが1282年にスペインアンダルクiアセヴィラセヴィラで生まれた時，父Pedro Lopez Padilla Ponce De Leon Ballestero To King Pedro Iは22歳，母Maria Gonzalez de Leivaは21歳であった。1330年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンソリアバーランガ ド ダエロモーアレスでMaría González de Henestrosaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1355年にスペインアンダルクiアセヴィラで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera(이)가 1282년 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라 세비라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pedro Lopez Padilla Ponce De Leon Ballestero To King Pedro I(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Gonzalez de Leiva(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1330년 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 소리아 벌랭가 데 드로 모라일스에서 María González de Henestrosa(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera nasceu em 1282, em Sevilla, Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha, seu pai, Pedro Lopez Padilla Ponce De Leon Ballestero To King Pedro I, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Maria Gonzalez de Leiva, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com María González de Henestrosa em 1330, em Morales, Berlanga de Duero, Soria, Castilla y León, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1355, em Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera родился в 1282 г. в местности севилла, севилла, андалукiа, Испания, его отцу по имени Pedro Lopez Padilla Ponce De Leon Ballestero To King Pedro I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Maria Gonzalez de Leiva, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени María González de Henestrosa в 1330 г. в местности мореилесь, бирланга де дуиро, соря, кастилла и леoн, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1355 г. в местности севилла, андалукiа, Испания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera nació en 1282, en Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, España, su papá, Pedro Lopez Padilla Ponce De Leon Ballestero To King Pedro I, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Maria Gonzalez de Leiva, tenía 21 años. Se casó con María González de Henestrosa en 1330, en Morales, Berlanga de Duero, Soria, Castilla y León, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1355, en Sevilla, Andalucía, España, a la edad de 73 años.
